decision-tree.root-question: Is the corpus ≥ 100k vectors AND production-bound?

branch.question: Does the team have ops capacity for self-hosting?

branch.conclusion: Self-host Qdrant. Enable binary quantization with rescoring. Apply r1, r2, r4, r5.
Self-host Qdrant. Enable scalar (Int8) quantization. Apply r1, r2, r4, r5.
Self-host Qdrant without quantization. Apply r1, r2, r4, r5.
Use Qdrant Cloud. Same rules apply; ops handled by managed service.
Skip Qdrant. Use Chroma for prototype or pgvector if Postgres already deployed.

example.p: 1.2M vectors, prod, dim=1536, RAM tight → self-hosted Qdrant + binary quantization + payload indexes on tenant_id, language → r3 applied.
